channel.title: 瞬間の筆記
channel.subtitle: 专注学习筆記
channel.description: 喜欢的东西就努力去追求，万一成功了呢！

item.title: javase连接数据库报错Communications link failure
javase触发事件
python爬虫乱码问题
idea开发必装插件
javase基础
关于idea的食用技巧
item.description: <pre><code class="lang-java">st </code></pre>

item.title: win10如何开启远程桌面
python文件的读取与写入
计算机系20级计算机科学与技术四班喜迎二十大
python爬虫-千千音乐
hexo端口4000被占用
item.description:
<h2 id="报错内容：Port-4000-has-been-used-Try-other-port-instead"><a href="#报错内容：Port-4000-has-been-used-Try-other-port-instead" class="headerlink" title="报错内容：Port 4000 has been used. Try other port instead."></a>报错内容：Port 4000 has been used. Try other port instead.</h2><p>译文：4000端口已被占用。尝试其他端口</p> <pre><code class="lang-bash">&gt;&gt;&gt; hexo s FATAL Port 4000 has been used. Try other port instead. FATAL &#123; err: Error: listen EADDRINUSE: address already in use :::4000 at Server.setupListenHandle [as _listen2] (net.js:1331:16) at listenInCluster (net.js:1379:12) at Server.listen (net.js:1465:7) at E:\Blog
ode_modules\hexo-server\lib\server.js:68:12 at Promise._execute (E:\Blog
ode_modules luebird\jselease\debuggability.js:384:9) at Promise._resolveFromExecutor (E:\Blog
ode_modules luebird\jselease\promise.js:518:18) at new Promise (E:\Blog
ode_modules luebird\jselease\promise.js:103:10) at checkPort (E:\Blog
ode_modules\hexo-server\lib\server.js:65:10) at Hexo.module.exports (E:\Blog
ode_modules\hexo-server\lib\server.js:17:10) at Hexo.tryCatcher (E:\Blog
ode_modules luebird\jselease\util.js:16:23) at Hexo.&lt;anonymous&gt; (E:\Blog
ode_modules luebird\jselease\method.js:15:34) at Hexo.call (E:\Blog
ode_modules\hexo\lib\hexo\index.js:258:27) at E:\studyAPP
ode_js
ode_global
ode_modules\hexo-cli\lib\hexo.js:60:17 at tryCatcher (E:\studyAPP
ode_js
ode_global
ode_modules\hexo-cli
ode_modules luebird\jselease\util.js:16:23) at Promise._settlePromiseFromHandler (E:\studyAPP
ode_js
ode_global
ode_modules\hexo-cli
ode_modules luebird\jselease\promise.js:547:31) at Promise._settlePromise (E:\studyAPP
ode_js
ode_global
ode_modules\hexo-cli
ode_modules luebird\jselease\promise.js:604:18) at Promise._settlePromise0 (E:\studyAPP
ode_js
ode_global
ode_modules\hexo-cli
ode_modules luebird\jselease\promise.js:649:10) at Promise._settlePromises (E:\studyAPP
ode_js
ode_global
ode_modules\hexo-cli
ode_modules luebird\jselease\promise.js:729:18) at _drainQueueStep (E:\studyAPP
ode_js
ode_global
ode_modules\hexo-cli
ode_modules luebird\jselease\async.js:93:12) at _drainQueue (E:\studyAPP
ode_js
ode_global
ode_modules\hexo-cli
ode_modules luebird\jselease\async.js:86:9) at Async._drainQueues (E:\studyAPP
ode_js
ode_global
ode_modules\hexo-cli
ode_modules luebird\jselease\async.js:102:5) at Immediate.Async.drainQueues (E:\studyAPP
ode_js
ode_global
ode_modules\hexo-cli
ode_modules luebird\jselease\async.js:15:14) &#123; code: &#39;EADDRINUSE&#39;, errno: -4091, syscall: &#39;listen&#39;, address: &#39;::&#39;, port: 4000 &#125; &#125; Something&#39;s wrong. Maybe you can find the solution here: %s https://hexo.io/docs/troubleshooting.html </code></pre> <p><img data-src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/0000rookie/imgs/2022050306.jpeg" alt=""></p> <h2 id="解决方法"><a href="#解决方法" class="headerlink" title="解决方法"></a>解决方法</h2><h3 id="方法一"><a href="#方法一" class="headerlink" title="方法一"></a>方法一</h3><p>杀掉<code>4000</code>被占用的端口，让<code>hexo</code>运行<code>4000</code>端口</p> <pre><code class="lang-bash"># 查看4000端口是什么程序占用 &gt;&gt;&gt; netstat -ano | findstr &quot;4000&quot; # 杀掉4000端口正在运行的程序 &gt;&gt;&gt; taskkill -PID 15868 -F </code></pre> <p><img data-src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/0000rookie/imgs/2022050215.jpeg" alt=""></p> <h3 id="方法二"><a href="#方法二" class="headerlink" title="方法二"></a>方法二</h3><p>在<code>_config.yml</code>修改hexo默认端口，在<code>hexo s</code>的时候就不是<code>4000</code>端口了</p> <pre><code class="lang-yaml">server: port: 4001 compress: true header: true </code></pre> <h3 id="方法三"><a href="#方法三" class="headerlink" title="方法三"></a>方法三</h3><p>指定端口运行，这里指定5000端口运行</p> <pre><code class="lang-bash">&gt;&gt;&gt; hexo server -p 5000 </code></pre>

item.title: python安装/更新包出现报错
Maven build失败 MAVEN:单元测试报错
numpy画复合函数
matplotlib制作条形图、直方图
GitHub使用技巧
javase程序国际化
item.description: <p><code>java Locale类 mark:1-20</code></p>
